## Severity Classification

- **WARNING** (margin 10-15%): Below minimum threshold. Review and adjust future quoting.
- **CRITICAL** (margin 0-10%): Significantly below minimum. Escalate to Donovan Weber. Immediate pricing review required.
- **LOSS** (margin <0%): Order lost money. Immediate escalation. Root cause investigation mandatory.

**This order is classified as: {{SEVERITY}}**
